zh.lifeSummary: 當King Hans Von Oldenburg of Denmark, Norway and Sweden於1455年2月2日出生在丹麥奧爾波格時，他的父親Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden29歲，母親Dorothea von Brandenburg25歲。他於1478年9月6日與Christina von Sachsen在丹麥奧本哈福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年2月20日在丹麥奧爾波斯沃 福盧奧爾波格享年58歲，埋葬在丹麥歐登塞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Hans Von Oldenburg of Denmark, Norway and Sweden于1455年2月2日出生在丹麦奧爾波格时，他的父亲Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden29岁，母亲Dorothea von Brandenburg25岁。他于1478年9月6日与Christina von Sachsen在丹麦奧本哈福结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年2月20日在丹麦奧爾波斯沃 福盧奧爾波格享年58岁，埋葬在丹麦歐登塞。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Oldenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Claus, Hans, Jurgen, Ruediger.

North German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Oldenburg, the capital of the former principality of the same name, from the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of Middle Low German ald, old ‘old’ + burg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Hans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When King Hans Von Oldenburg of Denmark, Norway and Sweden was born on 2 February 1455, in Ålborg, Denmark, his father, Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden, was 29 and his mother, Dorothea von Brandenburg, was 25. He married Christina von Sachsen on 6 September 1478, in København, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 February 1513, in Ålborg, Vor Frue, Ålborghus, Denmark, at the age of 58, and was buried in Odense, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Hans Von Oldenburg of Denmark, Norway and Sweden est né le 2 février 1455, à Ålborg, Danemark, son père, Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Dorothea von Brandenburg, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Christina von Sachsen le 6 septembre 1478, à København, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 février 1513, à Ålborg, Vor Frue, Ålborghus, Danemark, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Odense, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Hans Von Oldenburg of Denmark, Norway and Sweden am 2. Februar 1455 in Ålborg, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden 29 und seine Mutter Dorothea von Brandenburg 25. Er hat am 6. September 1478 in København, Dänemark Christina von Sachsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Februar 1513 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Ålborg, Vor Frue, Ålborghus, Dänemark und wurde in Odense, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Hans Von Oldenburg of Denmark, Norway and Sweden è nato il il 2 febbraio 1455 nel Ålborg, Danimarca, il suo padre, Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Dorothea von Brandenburg, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Christina von Sachsen il 6 settembre 1478, nel København, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 febbraio 1513, nel Ålborg, Vor Frue, Ålborghus, Danimarca, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Odense, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: King Hans Von Oldenburg of Denmark, Norway and Swedenが1455年2月2日にデンマークaルボルグで生まれた時，父Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Swedenは29歳，母Dorothea von Brandenburgは25歳であった。1478年9月6日にデンマーククoベンハヴンでChristina von Sachsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年2月20日にデンマークaルボルグハスボー フルaルボルグで58歳で死去し，デンマークオデンゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Hans Von Oldenburg of Denmark, Norway and Sweden(이)가 1455년 2월 2일 덴마크 a볼그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothea von Brandenburg(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1478년 9월 6일 덴마크 ko벤하브에서 Christina von Sachsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 2월 20일 덴마크 a볼그후스 보르 프루 a볼그에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 오덴스에 묻혔다.

pt.Schloss Gottorf, Schleswig-Holstein, Pru: Gottorf, Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Hans Von Oldenburg of Denmark, Norway and Sweden nasceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1455, em Ålborg, Dinamarca, seu pai, Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Dorothea von Brandenburg, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina von Sachsen em 6 de setembro de 1478, em København, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de fevereiro de 1513, em Ålborg, Vor Frue, Ålborghus, Dinamarca, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Odense, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Hans Von Oldenburg of Denmark, Norway and Sweden родился 2 февраля 1455 г. в местности aлборг, Дания, его отцу по имени Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothea von Brandenburg, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina von Sachsen 6 сентября 1478 г. в местности кoбенавн, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 февраля 1513 г. в местности aлборг, фор фру, aлборгус, Дания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности оденс, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Hans Von Oldenburg of Denmark, Norway and Sweden nació el 2 de febrero de 1455, en Ålborg, Dinamarca, su papá, Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Dorothea von Brandenburg, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Christina von Sachsen el 6 de septiembre de 1478, en København, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de febrero de 1513, en Ålborg, Vor Frue, Ålborghus, Dinamarca, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Odense, Dinamarca.
